prose:
**Pyridine frontier orbitals** — computed with DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** using chemkit tier `standard` in **PySCF**, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`; this was a frontier-orbital single-point calculation, not a geometry optimization.

Result: HOMO = **-7.2525992 eV**, LUMO = **-1.112786 eV**, HOMO–LUMO gap = **6.1398131 eV**. The SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings were reported by the tool result. Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy = true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit reported command `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpxorjnnsl/live.json`. The result JSON did not include a live `.out` log path, so I am not fabricating one.
